2604.13803.title: Gaslight, Gatekeep, V1-V3: Early Visual Cortex Alignment Shields Vision-Language Models from Sycophantic Manipulation
2604.13803.paper_summary: Vision-language models are increasingly deployed in high-stakes settings, yet their susceptibility to sycophantic manipulation remains poorly understood, particularly in relation to how these models represent visual information internally. Whether models whose visual representations more closely mirror human neural processing are also more resistant to adversarial pressure is an open question with implications for both neuroscience and AI safety. We investigate this question by evaluating 12 open-weight vision-language models spanning 6 architecture families and a 40$\times$ parameter range (256M--10B) along two axes: brain alignment, measured by predicting fMRI responses from the Natural Scenes Dataset across 8 human subjects and 6 visual cortex regions of interest, and sycophancy, measured through 76,800 two-turn gaslighting prompts spanning 5 categories and 10 difficulty levels. Region-of-interest analysis reveals that alignment specifically in early visual cortex (V1--V3) is a reliable negative predictor of sycophancy ($r = -0.441$, BCa 95\% CI $[-0.740, -0.031]$), with all 12 leave-one-out correlations negative and the strongest effect for existence denial attacks ($r = -0.597$, $p = 0.040$). This anatomically specific relationship is absent in higher-order category-selective regions, suggesting that faithful low-level visual encoding provides a measurable anchor against adversarial linguistic override in vision-language models. We release our code on \href{https://github.com/aryashah2k/Gaslight-Gatekeep-Sycophantic-Manipulation}{GitHub} and dataset on \href{https://huggingface.co/datasets/aryashah00/Gaslight-Gatekeep-V1-V3}{Hugging Face}
2604.13803.paper_summary_zh: 視覺-語言模型在高風險環境中的應用越來越廣泛，但它們對於拍馬屁操控的易感性仍然缺乏了解，特別是在這些模型如何內部表示視覺信息方面。模型的視覺表示是否更接近人類神經處理的情況下，對於對抗壓力的抵抗力是否更強，仍然是一個未解的問題，這對神經科學和人工智慧安全都有重要影響。我們通過評估12個開放權重的視覺-語言模型，涵蓋6種架構家族和40$\times$的參數範圍（256M--10B），來研究這個問題，並從兩個方面進行評估：大腦對齊，通過從自然場景數據集中預測8名受試者和6個視覺皮層感興趣區域的fMRI反應來測量，以及拍馬屁，通過76,800個涵蓋5個類別和10個難度級別的兩輪煤氣燈提示來測量。感興趣區域分析顯示，特別是在早期視覺皮層（V1--V3）的對齊是拍馬屁的可靠負預測因子（$r = -0.441$，BCa 95\% CI $[-0.740, -0.031]$），所有12個留一法相關性均為負值，並且存在否認攻擊的效果最強（$r = -0.597$，$p = 0.040$）。這一解剖學特定的關係在高階類別選擇區域中是缺失的，這表明忠實的低級視覺編碼提供了一個可測量的錨點，以對抗視覺-語言模型中的對抗性語言覆蓋。我們在 \href{https://github.com/aryashah2k/Gaslight-Gatekeep-Sycophantic-Manipulation}{GitHub} 上釋出我們的代碼，並在 \href{https://huggingface.co/datasets/aryashah00/Gaslight-Gatekeep-V1-V3}{Hugging Face} 上釋出數據集。
2604.13803.author: Arya Shah et.al.
2604.13803.authors: Arya Shah, Vaibhav Tripathi, Mayank Singh, Chaklam Silpasuwanchai
